primary_texts: Talent sourcing is changing fast. New AI tools and techniques are reshaping how top recruiters find candidates — and most teams haven't even heard of them yet. Join Michal's LIVE workshop and leave with a toolkit you can apply immediately.

The tools that top sourcers rely on today didn't exist two years ago. AI-powered search, automated outreach, and smarter pipelines are changing the game. Learn the exact techniques in one LIVE, hands-on session.

New sourcing tools are making skilled recruiters unstoppable — cutting research time in half and surfacing candidates no one else is finding. Discover what's possible in Michal's upcoming LIVE workshop.
